templates.title: Bookable
templates.name: bookable
templates.description: A modern booking system for service-based businesses, built with Bun, Elysia, Next.js, and PostgreSQL.

env.name: NAME
env.label: Project Name
env.description: Project name used for the deployment using docker compose.

env.name: HOSTNAME
env.label: Hostname
env.description: Public hostname used to access the application.

env.name: DB_USER
env.label: Database User
env.description: PostgreSQL username used by the app.

env.name: DB_PASSWORD
env.label: Database Password
env.description: PostgreSQL password for the database user.

env.name: DB_NAME
env.label: Database Name
env.description: PostgreSQL database name used by the app.

env.name: CORE_IMAGE
env.label: Core Image
env.description: Container image reference for the core API service.

env.name: WEB_IMAGE
env.label: Web Image
env.description: Container image reference for the frontend web service.

env.name: BACKOFFICE_IMAGE
env.label: Backoffice Image
env.description: Container image reference for the backoffice/admin UI service.

env.name: MIGRATION_IMAGE
env.label: Migration Image
env.description: Container image reference for the database migration job.

env.name: VERSION
env.label: Version
env.description: Version tag for the images. This will override the default image tags if specified.

env.name: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET
env.label: Better Auth Secret
env.description: Secret key used for authentication and session signing.

env.name: ADMIN_EMAIL
env.label: Admin Email
env.description: Default administrator email for initial login.

env.name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
env.label: Admin Password
env.description: Default administrator password for initial login.

env.name: R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID
env.label: R2 Access Key ID
env.description: Access key ID for Cloudflare R2 storage.

env.name: R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
env.label: R2 Secret Access Key
env.description: Secret access key for Cloudflare R2 storage.

env.name: R2_BUCKET_NAME
env.label: R2 Bucket Name
env.description: Bucket name used for file storage.
